sourcesContent:
<template src="./template.html"></template>
<style src="./style.css"></style>
<script>
    export default {
  name: 'OSIPicta',
  
  data() {
    return {
      images: [],
      currentIndex: -1,
      isLoading: false,
      isDragOver: false,
      scale: 1,
      translateX: 0,
      translateY: 0,
      isDragging: false,
      dragStart: { x: 0, y: 0 },
      infoPanelVisible: false,
      currentImageInfo: {},
      
      // Для throttle
      saveTimeout: null
    }
  },
  
  computed: {
    currentImage() {
      return this.images[this.currentIndex] || null;
    },
    
    imageStyle() {
      if (!this.currentImage) return {};
      
      return {
        transform: `translate(${this.translateX}px, ${this.translateY}px) scale(${this.scale})`,
        transformOrigin: 'top left',
        cursor: this.isDragging ? 'grabbing' : 'grab',
        opacity: this.isLoading ? 0.5 : 1
      };
    }
  },
  
  methods: {
    // === Простой throttle без lodash ===
    throttledSaveState() {
      if (this.saveTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(this.saveTimeout);
      }
      
      this.saveTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        this.saveToSystemState();
        this.saveTimeout = null;
      }, 2000);
    },
    
    // === Открытие файлов ===
    openFilePicker() {
      this.$refs.fileInput.click();
    },
    
    async handleFileSelect(event) {
      const files = Array.from(event.target.files);
      await this.loadImages(files);
      event.target.value = '';
    },
    
    async handleDrop(event) {
      this.isDragOver = false;
      const files = Array.from(event.dataTransfer.files);
      const imageFiles = files.filter(file => file.type.startsWith('image/'));
      
      if (imageFiles.length === 0) {
        alert('Пожалуйста, перетащите файлы изображений');
        return;
      }
      
      await this.loadImages(imageFiles);
    },
    
    async loadImages(files) {
      this.isLoading = true;
      
      try {
        const newImages = [];
        
        for (const file of files) {
          const dataUrl = await this.fileToDataUrl(file);
          newImages.push({
            file,
            dataUrl,
            name: file.name,
            type: file.type,
            size: file.size,
            lastModified: file.lastModified
          });
        }
        
        this.images = [...this.images, ...newImages];
        
        if (this.images.length > 0 && this.currentIndex === -1) {
          this.currentIndex = 0;
          this.$nextTick(() => {
            this.fitToWindow();
          });
        }
        
        this.saveToSystemState();
        
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Ошибка загрузки изображений:', error);
        alert('Не удалось загрузить изображения');
      } finally {
        this.isLoading = false;
      }
    },
    
    fileToDataUrl(file) {
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = (e) => resolve(e.target.result);
        reader.onerror = (e) => reject(e);
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
      });
    },
    
    // === Навигация ===
    nextImage() {
      if (this.currentIndex < this.images.length - 1) {
        this.currentIndex++;
        this.resetView();
        this.$nextTick(() => {
          this.fitToWindow();
        });
      }
    },
    
    prevImage() {
      if (this.currentIndex > 0) {
        this.currentIndex--;
        this.resetView();
        this.$nextTick(() => {
          this.fitToWindow();
        });
      }
    },
    
    // === Zoom и панорамирование ===
    zoomIn() {
      this.scale *= 1.2;
      this.limitScale();
      this.throttledSaveState();
    },
    
    zoomOut() {
      this.scale *= 0.8;
      this.limitScale();
      this.throttledSaveState();
    },
    
    resetZoom() {
      this.scale = 1;
      this.centerImage();
      this.throttledSaveState();
    },
    
    fitToWindow() {
      if (!this.currentImage || !this.$refs.image) return;
      
      const viewport = this.$refs.viewport;
      const img = this.$refs.image;
      
      if (img.complete) {
        const scaleX = viewport.clientWidth / img.naturalWidth;
        const scaleY = viewport.clientHeight / img.naturalHeight;
        this.scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, 1);
        this.centerImage();
        this.throttledSaveState();
      }
    },
    
    centerImage() {
      if (!this.$refs.image || !this.$refs.viewport) return;
      
      const viewport = this.$refs.viewport;
      const img = this.$refs.image;
      
      this.translateX = Math.max(0, (viewport.clientWidth - img.naturalWidth * this.scale) / 2);
      this.translateY = Math.max(0, (viewport.clientHeight - img.naturalHeight * this.scale) / 2);
    },
    
    resetView() {
      this.scale = 1;
      this.translateX = 0;
      this.translateY = 0;
    },
    
    limitScale() {
      this.scale = Math.min(5, Math.max(0.1, this.scale));
    },
    
    // === Drag для панорамирования ===
    startDrag(e) {
      if (e.button !== 0 || !this.currentImage) return;
      
      this.isDragging = true;
      this.dragStart = {
        x: e.clientX - this.translateX,
        y: e.clientY - this.translateY
      };
    },
    
    onDrag(e) {
      if (!this.isDragging) return;
      
      this.translateX = e.clientX - this.dragStart.x;
      this.translateY = e.clientY - this.dragStart.y;
    },
    
    stopDrag() {
      if (this.isDragging) {
        this.isDragging = false;
        this.throttledSaveState();
      }
    },
    
    // === Wheel для zoom ===
    handleWheel(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (!this.currentImage) return;
      
      const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
      this.scale *= delta;
      this.limitScale();
      this.throttledSaveState();
    },
    
    // === Информация о файле ===
    showFileInfo() {
      if (!this.currentImage) return;
      
      const img = this.$refs.image;
      this.currentImageInfo = {
        ...this.currentImage,
        width: img ? img.naturalWidth : 0,
        height: img ? img.naturalHeight : 0
      };
      
      this.infoPanelVisible = true;
    },
    
    onImageLoad() {
      if (this.scale === 1) {
        this.fitToWindow();
      }
      
      if (this.infoPanelVisible) {
        this.showFileInfo();
      }
      
      this.saveToSystemState();
    },
    
    onImageError() {
      alert('Не удалось загрузить изображение');
    },
    
    // === Форматирование ===
    formatFileSize(bytes) {
      if (bytes === 0) return '0 Б';
      const k = 1024;
      const sizes = ['Б', 'КБ', 'МБ', 'ГБ'];
      const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
      return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
    },
    
    formatDate(timestamp) {
      return new Date(timestamp).toLocaleString();
    },
    
    // === Полный экран ===
    toggleFullscreen() {
      const container = this.$el;
      if (!document.fullscreenElement) {
        container.requestFullscreen();
      } else {
        document.exitFullscreen();
      }
    },
    
    // === Интеграция с системой ===
    saveToSystemState() {
      // Здесь ваша логика сохранения в системный стор
      console.log('Saving state:', {
        currentIndex: this.currentIndex,
        scale: this.scale,
        translateX: this.translateX,
        translateY: this.translateY
      });
      
      // Пример, если есть системный store
      if (this.$system) {
        this.$system.saveState('OSIPicta', {
          images: this.images.map(img => ({
            name: img.name,
            type: img.type,
            size: img.size,
            dataUrl: img.dataUrl
          })),
          currentIndex: this.currentIndex,
          scale: this.scale,
          translateX: this.translateX,
          translateY: this.translateY
        });
      }
    }
  },
  
  mounted() {
    // Клавиатурные события
    window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.ctrlKey) {
        switch(e.key) {
          case 'o':
          case 'O':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.openFilePicker();
            break;
          case '+':
          case '=':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.zoomIn();
            break;
          case '-':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.zoomOut();
            break;
          case '0':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.resetZoom();
            break;
        }
      } else {
        switch(e.key) {
          case 'ArrowRight':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.nextImage();
            break;
          case 'ArrowLeft':
            e.preventDefault();
            this.prevImage();
            break;
        }
      }
    });
    
    // Восстановление состояния
    if (this.$system) {
      const savedState = this.$system.getState('OSIPicta');
      if (savedState) {
        this.images = savedState.images || [];
        this.currentIndex = savedState.currentIndex || -1;
        this.scale = savedState.scale || 1;
        this.translateX = savedState.translateX || 0;
        this.translateY = savedState.translateY || 0;
      }
    }
  },
  
  // Заменяем beforeDestroy на beforeUnmount
  beforeUnmount() {
    this.saveToSystemState();
    
    // Очищаем таймеры
    if (this.saveTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(this.saveTimeout);
    }
    
    // Убираем обработчики событий
    window.removeEventListener('keydown', this.keydownHandler); // если сохраняли handler
  }
}
</script>
